title: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Glenmark Pharmaceuticals in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
